_meta.title: The Twelve Cell Salts of the Zodiac
_meta.subtitle: The missing mineral layer that ties Astryx together
_meta.lineage: Dr. Wilhelm Schuessler (1873, biochemic system) → Dr. George W. Carey & Inez Perry (1919-1932, zodiacal mapping) → Santos Bonacci (modern syncretic teaching)
sourcesUsed: Carey & Perry — The Zodiac and the Twelve Salts of Salvation (1932)
Universal Truth School — Cell/Tissue Salts framework
Book of Wisdom — Christ Oil & Gestation Deficiency rule
_meta.principle: Each of the 12 zodiacal signs corresponds in vibration to one of the 12 inorganic cell salts present in every cell of the human body. A deficiency in the salt of your Sun sign (which is consumed more rapidly than other salts) is the chemical basis of physical, emotional, and mental dis-ease. Restoring the salt restores cellular homeostasis.

gestationDeficiencyRule.summary: Human gestation is 9 months. The 3 zodiac signs immediately AFTER your Sun sign (the 3 you did not gestate through) are your innate baseline mineral deficiencies for life.
gestationDeficiencyRule.example: Sun in Scorpio → gestation covers the 9 signs ending at Scorpio. The 3 signs missed = Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius → baseline deficiencies in Silica, Calc Phos, Nat Mur.
gestationDeficiencyRule.moonSignFactor: Under emotional stress, the cell salts of your Moon sign and South Node are consumed more rapidly. Depletion presents as anxiety, panic, depression.
gestationDeficiencyRule.transitFactor: When a major transit activates a sign, the salt of that sign is consumed more rapidly across the population.
gestationDeficiencyRule.fullTermNote: Full-term cusp-to-cusp birth → typically 3 deficiencies. Mid-sign birth → 4+ deficiencies. Premature birth → 4+ deficiencies.

_meta.safetyNote: All Schuessler tissue salts at 6X-12X biochemic potency are non-toxic and safe for adults, children, pregnancy, and elderly. Standard form contains lactose — use spray or liquid form if lactose intolerant. Always consult a licensed healthcare provider or homeopath before beginning a new supplement regimen, especially when pregnant, nursing, or taking prescription medication.

biological.primaryFunction: Building block of brain and nerve cell tissue; cellular antiseptic that counteracts organic decay; supports neurotransmitter synthesis and gray matter integrity
biological.mechanism: Concentrated in tissues and fluids of brain and nerve cells. Has antiseptic action that prevents cellular decay. Essential constituent of nerve fluid — the chemical base of material expression and understanding itself per Carey.
biological.endocrineTarget: Pineal gland and pituitary body (Carey's 'third eye / optic thalamus' axis)
biological.nervousSystemRole: Primary mineral basis of all nerve tissue. Critical for cortical function, signal transmission, and parasympathetic recovery. Pairs with Mag Phos for nervous system rescue.

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: Your brain feels foggy and your nerves feel raw. Small things annoy you more than they should. You're mentally exhausted but can't sleep. This is your nerve cells running out of fuel — the body's #1 conductor mineral is depleted.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Aries
Sustained mental work, study, or grief
complementarySalts: Mag Phos (Leo) — for resulting nervous spasms and pain
Calc Phos (Capricorn) — for nutritional support during recovery
Nat Mur (Aquarius) — pairs for nervous-origin headaches

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Gad, seventh son of Jacob — 'armed and prepared'
esoteric.discipleCorrespondence: Thomas — natural doubter until they figure things out for themselves
esoteric.affirmation: My nervous system is whole and bright. My mind is the clear temple of intelligence. I rest, I think clearly, I am armed and prepared.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily, 30 minutes away from food/drink/strong flavors (mint, coffee, citrus)
cellSalts.kitProduct: Aries Nerve Tonic Blend — Kali Phos foods + adaptogens

biological.primaryFunction: Regulates the density of intercellular fluids by eliminating excess water; governs liver function and bile production; clears auto-intoxication from the system
biological.mechanism: One molecule of Nat Sulph removes two molecules of water from the body. Excess atmospheric water absorbed through the lungs is eliminated by this salt. Without it, waste fluids accumulate in blood and tissue causing self-poisoning.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Supports cerebellum function (Carey's 'lower brain') — coordination, balance, and the foundation of the spinal column. Liver congestion creates back-of-head tension extending down the spine.

facialSigns: bluish redness in front of ears
redness in external corner of eye

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You feel heavy, swollen, and slow. Your skin and tongue look puffy. Your liver feels overworked — bitter taste in your mouth, brain fog after eating, fluid retention. This is your body's water-eliminator running on empty.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Taurus
Recovering from flu or liver stress
complementarySalts: Nat Mur (Aquarius) — water distribution counterpart
Nat Phos (Libra) — body fluid balance
Kali Mur (Gemini) — supports liver bile when stools are light-colored

esoteric.careyName: The Winged Bull of the Zodiac
esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Asher, eighth son of Jacob — 'blessedness or happiness'
esoteric.affirmation: I am the winged bull — grounded in earth, soaring in spirit. My liver is clear, my body releases what it does not need, my blood is the elixir of life.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily, 30 minutes away from food/drink/strong flavors
cellSalts.kitProduct: Taurus Liver Cleanse Tea — Nat Sulph foods + dandelion + burdock

biological.primaryFunction: Builds and diffuses fibrin throughout the body; produces saliva and supports early-stage digestion; cleanses blood and lymphatic discharge
biological.mechanism: Combines with organic fibrin. Deficiency causes fibrin to thicken and discharge as thick white catarrh, mucus, or coatings — the body's signal that fibrin is misfiring. Concerned with saliva production (digestion's first step) and works with Nat Mur to produce hydrochloric acid.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Supports the nervous relay — the upper-body wiring between brain and extremities. Restless mind + shallow breathing often signal Kali Mur depletion combined with Aries Kali Phos depletion.

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You're producing thick white mucus, your throat hurts, your glands are swollen. Your mind is scattered and your breathing is shallow. The fibrin in your blood — the stuff that should be cleanly woven through your tissue — is gumming up.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Gemini
Children's inflammatory illnesses (alternate with Ferr Phos)
After eating fatty or rich foods that aggravate symptoms
complementarySalts: Ferr Phos (Pisces) — alternate for inflammatory respiratory illness
Calc Sulph (Scorpio) — both cleanse and purify blood
Nat Mur (Aquarius) — partners for hydrochloric acid production

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Issachar, ninth son of Jacob — 'price, reward, recompense'
esoteric.discipleCorrespondence: Judas — 'service or necessity' (true esoteric meaning, not the perverted dark-age reading)
esoteric.affirmation: My breath is clear, my words are clean, my lungs are open. The fibrin of my blood weaves perfectly through every tissue. I speak the truth that needs to be spoken.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily, 30 minutes away from food/drink/strong flavors. Alternate with Ferr Phos every 30 min during acute fever.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Gemini Clear Breath Tea — Kali Mur foods + mullein + thyme

biological.primaryFunction: Provides elasticity to all connective tissue — skin, muscle, blood vessels, tooth enamel, bone surfaces; supports the meninges between cerebrum and cerebellum
biological.mechanism: Forms elastic fiber by uniting fluorine with lime and albuminoids. Found on the surface of bones, in tooth enamel, in elastic fibers of skin, muscular tissue, and blood vessels. Deficiency causes relaxed tissue throughout the system.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Holds elastic tone of the membrane between cerebrum and cerebellum. When deficient, the positive/negative brain poles 'sag apart' — Carey identifies this as the chemical signature of groundless fear of financial ruin.

emotional: groundless fear of financial ruin (Carey's hallmark sign)
mental: mental sagging between focus and rest
rigid thinking that breaks rather than flexes
facialSigns: cracked lips and corners of mouth

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You have a groundless fear about money or security that won't lift. Your skin is cracking, your veins are showing, your tissue feels loose and weak. This is your body's elastic fiber failing — the rubber that holds you together has lost its bounce.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Cancer
Mars or Mercury (or both) in Cancer at birth
Pregnancy or postpartum recovery (stretch marks, hemorrhoids)
Varicose veins or vein health concerns
Persistent financial anxiety with no actual cause
complementarySalts: Silica (Sagittarius) — both support connective tissue and bone
Calc Phos (Capricorn) — for skeletal nutrition
Ferr Phos (Pisces) — for vascular wall strength

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Zebulun, tenth son of Jacob — 'dwelling place or habitation'
esoteric.affirmation: My tissues hold their proper tone. My body is the elastic temple of my soul. I am held safely — my home is within me, and I am secure.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily. IMPORTANT: Calcium Fluoride is NOT the same as Sodium Fluoride (the water-fluoridation chemical). Biochemic Calc Fluor is naturally sourced and safe.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Cancer Tissue Tone Blend — Calc Fluor foods + horsetail + nettle

biological.primaryFunction: Supplements Kali Phos as a nerve mineral; relaxes white nerve fibers and muscular tissue; relieves all forms of cramping, spasm, and shooting pain
biological.mechanism: Connected to the nervous system where it supplements Kali Phos. When deficient, white nerve fibers contract causing spasms, cramps, neuralgia, and shooting pains. Essential for the rhythmic, coherent movement of muscle. Pain relieved by heat, pressure, bending double; aggravated by cold and touch.
biological.endocrineTarget: Heart-thymus axis; the 'alchemical vase' of the cardiovascular endocrine system
biological.nervousSystemRole: Governs the motor nerves and the cardiac vagal response. The 'Lion's spring' — the impulse that throbs through the heart. Critical for rhythmic muscle action and heart coherence.

mental: sudden mental cramps (writers block, performance freeze)
facialSigns: red round spots on cheeks (always or temporarily)

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: Sharp, shooting, cramping pain — anywhere. Muscle twitches. Menstrual cramps. Hiccups that won't stop. Heart palpitations. Whatever's spasming, the rhythm-keeper of your nervous system needs magnesium. Heat helps; cold makes it worse.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Leo
Acute cramping pain of any kind (take every 15-30 min until relieved)
complementarySalts: Kali Phos (Aries) — pairs for nervous asthma and insomnia
Ferr Phos (Pisces) — for cardiovascular support
Calc Phos (Capricorn) — for muscular spasm in skeletal context

esoteric.affirmation: My heart beats in perfect rhythm. My nerves are relaxed and my muscles flow with ease. I am the heart of the zodiac — radiant, rhythmic, and at rest in motion.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue. For acute cramping, dissolve in HOT water and sip slowly — heat amplifies the action. Apply heat externally to the spasming area.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Leo Anti-Spasm Blend — Mag Phos foods + cramp bark + ginger

biological.primaryFunction: Manufactures oil throughout the tissue; carries oxygen to cells in partnership with Ferr Phos; supports skin, scalp, and the lining of all internal organs
biological.mechanism: Special affinity for cells lining the skin and the internal mucous lining of all organs. Forms oil by uniting potash with albuminoids and aerial elements. Deficiency thickens the oil in tissue, clogging the seven million pores of the skin (Carey's count), turning heat and secretions inward. Together with Ferr Phos, carries oxygen to cells.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Solar plexus = great receiving station of energy from the back brain (Carey). Kali Sulph keeps the skin pores open as 'safety valves of the human engine' — when blocked, heat returns inward and disturbs the autonomic nervous system.

mental: mental dullness from poor cellular oxygenation
critical and analytical to the point of paralysis

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: Your skin is breaking out — yellow, scaling, oily and irritated. Dandruff that won't quit. Your bowels feel sluggish. You alternate between feeling chilly and flushed. The oil-making machinery of your body is jammed, and oxygen isn't reaching your cells properly.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Virgo
Persistent skin conditions (psoriasis, eczema, athlete's foot)
complementarySalts: Ferr Phos (Pisces) — partners for oxygen transport
Silica (Sagittarius) — both support skin, hair, nails
Nat Mur (Aquarius) — for hair and scalp health

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Joseph, twelfth son of Jacob — 'to increase power' or 'son of the right hand'
esoteric.affirmation: My skin is clear, my breath gives oxygen to every cell. My discrimination serves me — I analyze with love, not criticism. I am the pure sea from which life is made.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily. Best taken away from sulfur-rich meals so absorption isn't competed against.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Virgo Skin Balance Blend — Kali Sulph foods + burdock + calendula

biological.primaryFunction: Holds the balance between acid and alkaline in blood, nerve, brain, and intercellular fluids; emulsifies fatty acids; regulates bile consistency
biological.mechanism: Present in blood, muscle, nerve and brain cells, plus intercellular fluids. Promotes water absorption via lactic acid decomposition. Distinct from Nat Mur (water distribution) and Nat Sulph (water elimination) — these three together control all body fluid behavior. Deficiency allows uric acid to crystallize around joints.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Acid blood = irritated brain cells = hate, envy, jealousy, war, murder per Carey. Nat Phos restores 'divine harmony' to the brain's chemistry. Critical for nervous system pH and the calm-clarity baseline.

physical: rheumatic pain and joint stiffness from uric acid
creamy golden-yellow tongue coating and discharge
emotional: hate, envy, jealousy, criticism (Carey's hallmark — caused by acid brain chemistry)
mental: inability to find the middle path

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: Your face is greasy and breaking out. Your joints ache, your stomach is sour, you feel critical and jealous of others. Your body is too acidic. The alkaline balancer is missing — and Carey says this is the chemical root of disharmony, envy, and competitive irritation.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Libra
Persistent acid reflux or gastric acidity
Joint pain attributed to uric acid (gout, rheumatism)
Emotional state of envy, jealousy, comparison
complementarySalts: Nat Sulph (Taurus) — fluid balance partner
Nat Mur (Aquarius) — fluid balance partner (the trio controls all body fluids)
Ferr Phos (Pisces) — for inflammatory acidic pain

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Reuben, first son of Jacob — 'Vision of the Sun'
esoteric.discipleCorrespondence: Peter — from Petra meaning 'stone or mineral' ('On thee, Peter [mineral], will I build my church')
esoteric.affirmation: I am perfectly balanced — acid and alkaline, giving and receiving, self and other. My brain chemistry holds harmony. I see clearly, judge fairly, love freely.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily, away from food. For acid reflux, take 15 min before meals.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Libra pH Balance Blend — Nat Phos foods + dandelion + slippery elm

biological.primaryFunction: Removes waste products from blood via the liver; cleanses non-functional organic matter from tissue; resolves abscesses and slow-healing wounds; purifies and renews blood
biological.mechanism: Found in the liver where it eliminates waste from the bloodstream. Cleans accumulated non-functional organic matter from connective tissue, causing infiltrated parts to discharge before they injure surrounding tissue. Crude form is gypsum; alchemically transmuted to 'plaster of Paris' — Carey's symbol for Scorpio transformation.
biological.nervousSystemRole: The 'transformation salt' — supports the nervous system through periods of intense regeneration. Critical when the system is detoxifying or recovering from suppressed elimination.

physical: abscesses and boils that won't heal
emotional: intense emotional suppression manifesting in skin
feelings of being 'unclean' that won't lift
rage that turns inward into illness

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You have wounds, abscesses, or acne that won't heal. Your skin won't clear. Old emotional stuff is trying to come out and getting stuck. This is your body's deep cleaner — the salt that pulls poison up and out — running on empty.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Scorpio
Stubborn skin conditions with slow healing
Recovering from suppressed illness or emotional suppression
complementarySalts: Kali Mur (Gemini) — both cleanse and purify blood (treat catarrh, acne together)
Silica (Sagittarius) — for pus formation and discharge
Calc Fluor (Cancer) — for tissue restoration after eruption

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Simeon, second son of Jacob — 'hears and obeys'
esoteric.affirmation: I transmute the lower into the higher. My wounds become my wisdom. I am the White Eagle, risen from the scorpion. My blood is pure, my body is renewed.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily, away from food.
cellSalts.safetyNote: Carey lists malachite as a Scorpio gem. In Astryx the rule is absolute: malachite gets a red warning badge everywhere. Raw malachite contains toxic copper carbonate dust. Only polished and sealed malachite is safe for body contact, and never for elixirs or ingestion.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Scorpio Deep Cleanse Blend — Calc Sulph foods + red clover + burdock

biological.primaryFunction: Cellular surgeon — sharp-edged molecules cut passages through tissue to discharge pus and decay; strengthens connective tissue, bone covering, nerve sheath, hair, skin, nails
biological.mechanism: Found in hair, skin, nails, periosteum (bone covering), neurilemma (nerve sheath), with traces in bone tissue. Its molecules remain sharp and pointed even when triturated — they act like microscopic lancets, pushing decaying organic matter out through suppuration. The body's natural surgeon — no scalpel required.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Protects the neurilemma — the sheath around every nerve. When deficient, nerves become exposed and over-reactive. Long-term Silica deficiency = nervous oversensitivity and connective tissue weakness simultaneously.

physical: stomach pains worse at night, better with heat
facialSigns: vertical wrinkles in front of ears

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You have a boil, abscess, or wound full of pus that won't drain. Your hair and nails are brittle. Your nerves feel exposed — every sound is too loud, every light too bright. You need your body's internal surgeon to come back online.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Sagittarius
Brittle hair, nails, thin/weak connective tissue
complementarySalts: Calc Sulph (Scorpio) — for suppuration and pus
Nat Mur (Aquarius) — partners for healthy hair, skin
Kali Sulph (Virgo) — for skin and nail health

esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Levi, third son of Jacob — 'joined or associated'
esoteric.affirmation: I am the archer — my aim is true, my arrow is silica-tipped, my vision pierces the distance. My body's internal surgeon does its work perfectly. I am strong, sharp, and clear.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily. Caution: do NOT use Silica if you have surgical implants, pins, or pacemakers — Silica's discharge action can theoretically work to expel foreign objects from tissue.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Sagittarius Connective Tonic — Silica foods + horsetail + bamboo

cellSalt.careyTitle: General Tonic / Nutrition Salt / Bone Health

biological.primaryFunction: Builds bone, teeth, and connective tissue; unites with albumin as cement for skeletal structure; restores tone to weakened organs; primary cell-builder of the body
biological.mechanism: Bone is 57% calcium phosphate. Uses albumin as cement to build bone, teeth, blood corpuscles, and gastric juices. Promotes healthy cellular activity and restores tone to weakened tissues. Carey's 'White Stone' that the builders rejected — biochemistry as the cornerstone of the temple of the body.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Foundational nutrition for the entire nervous system. The deep restorer when the system is depleted. Pairs with Kali Phos for nervous-system rebuilding after chronic stress.

emotional: deep solitude of the soul (Carey's phrase)
dwelling in air castles unable to manifest
mental: inability to build/finish what one starts

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: Your bones feel weak. Your teeth are brittle. You're tired down to the foundation. You build elaborate plans in your mind but can't manifest them. Your body's primary builder is missing — the white stone the foundation rests on.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Capricorn
Skin issues from Saturn pathology (Carey notes skin)
complementarySalts: Ferr Phos (Pisces) — for anemia
Kali Phos (Aries) — for senile itching, nervous-skeletal pairing
Calc Fluor (Cancer) — both calcium-based, complementary tissue work

esoteric.careyName: The Goat of the Zodiac / The White Stone
esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Judah, fourth son of Jacob — 'the praise of the Lord'
esoteric.affirmation: I am the white stone — the foundation of my own temple. My bones are strong, my structure is sound, I build what I envision. The Great Work commences in the Goat.

cellSalts.homeopathicPotency: 6X (general tonic — can be taken long-term as foundational support)
cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily. Calc Phos is the most versatile cell salt — acts as intercurrent remedy to assist any other salt's action.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Capricorn Foundation Blend — Calc Phos foods + horsetail + nettle

biological.primaryFunction: Distributes water throughout every fluid and solid of the body; controls moisture ebb and flow; essential for cell division, growth, and glandular activity; produces hydrochloric acid
biological.mechanism: Enters into the composition of every body fluid and solid. Powerful affinity for water — controls the moisture balance of the entire system. Without it, cell division and normal growth cannot proceed. Common table salt CANNOT do this work — it is too coarse for mucous membrane absorbents. Only triturated biochemic Nat Mur works.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Critical for nerve signal transmission (sodium channels). Depletion mirrors emotional dehydration — 'low spirits with feeling of hopelessness'. Hay fever and watery discharges signal Nat Mur deficiency.

physical: weak eyes that water in wind
mental: unable to think clearly when dehydrated at the cellular level
facialSigns: humid shine on upper eyelid (gelatin/snail-mucus appearance)

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You're either too wet or too dry — somewhere in your body, the water is misdistributed. You crave salt. Your eyes water in wind. You feel hopeless without reason. The thing that should be balancing every fluid in your body has dropped below threshold.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Aquarius
Sustained grief or unprocessed emotional water
Use INSTEAD of table salt — different action entirely
complementarySalts: Nat Sulph (Taurus) and Nat Phos (Libra) — the trio that controls all body fluids
Kali Mur (Gemini) — partners for hydrochloric acid production
Ferr Phos (Pisces) — for inflammatory watery conditions

esoteric.careyName: The Sign of the Son of Man / The Water Bearer
esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Dan, fifth son of Jacob — 'judgment' or 'he that judges'
esoteric.affirmation: I am the Water Bearer. The waters within me flow in perfect balance — every cell receives its share, no part is parched, no part is flooded. I judge with clarity, I love with all my fluid being.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue, 3x daily. Can be used even when on a salt-free diet — biochemic Nat Mur is fundamentally different from table salt in the way the body receives it.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Aquarius Water Balance Blend — Nat Mur foods + nettle + oat straw

biological.primaryFunction: Carries oxygen via hemoglobin; first-aid salt for all acute inflammation, fever, congestion, bleeding, and the early stages of any disease; strengthens vascular walls
biological.mechanism: Enters into the composition of hemoglobin. Takes oxygen from inhaled air and carries it through the blood to every cell. Strengthens circular walls of blood vessels, especially arteries. Should be considered SUPPLEMENTARY to whatever other treatment is indicated — oxygen is required for all healing. Carey calls iron the 'magnetic mineral' due to its oxygen affinity.
biological.nervousSystemRole: Acute inflammation is the nervous system's alarm response. Ferr Phos calms the system by oxygenating tissue where blood is congested. Pisces people have great magnetic healing power in hands (Carey) — Ferr Phos amplifies this magnetic transmission.

physical: anemia with low red blood cells
bleeding from cuts (can apply powder directly)
mental: mental dullness from poor cellular oxygenation
facialSigns: blue-black shade in nasal root and under eyes

cellSalts.plainLanguageSignal: You have a fever, an inflammation, an acute injury, or you just feel oxygen-starved and exhausted. Whatever is happening, your blood needs more oxygen NOW. This is the FIRST salt to reach for in any acute episode — and the salt to keep on hand always.
whenToConsider: Sun, Moon, or Rising in Pisces
ANY acute illness — first aid response (take every 30 min while symptoms acute)
Children's acute ailments (combine with Kali Mur)
complementarySalts: Calc Phos (Capricorn) — for anemia
Kali Mur (Gemini) — alternate every 30 min for inflammation/fever
ALL OTHER SALTS — Ferr Phos is universal supplementary remedy because oxygen is required for any healing

esoteric.careyName: The Fish That Swim in the Pure Sea
esoteric.bibleAlchemy: Naphtali, sixth son of Jacob — 'wrestling of God' (Pisces natives worry because they cannot do more for those in trouble)
esoteric.affirmation: I am the magnetic one. My blood drinks oxygen freely, my body heals quickly, my hands carry healing magnetism. I am the fish that swims in the pure sea — fluid, oxygenated, alive.

cellSalts.dosing: Traditionally taken as 4 tablets under the tongue. For acute episodes — fever, injury, inflammation — take every 30 minutes for first 2 hours, then 3x daily until resolved. Note: Ferr Phos is NOT an iron tonic in the conventional sense — its action is nutritional with no side effects, easily assimilated.
cellSalts.kitProduct: Pisces First Aid Blend — Ferr Phos foods + nettle + yellow dock

deficiencyAlgorithm.description: For each Sun sign, this lookup returns the 3 cell salts most likely to be in deficiency from birth (Bonacci's gestation rule). These are the 3 zodiac signs immediately AFTER the Sun sign in the wheel — the 3 months of gestation the embryo did not complete.
